initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    (t2.balance - t1.balance) * 1.0 / t1.balance AS increase_rate
FROM loan l
JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN trans t1 ON a.account_id = t1.account_id AND t1.date = '1993-03-22'
JOIN trans t2 ON a.account_id = t2.account_id AND t2.date = '1998-12-27'
WHERE l.date = '1993-07-05' AND l.status = 'A'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    (t2.balance - t1.balance) * 1.0 / t1.balance AS increase_rate
FROM 
    loan l
JOIN 
    account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    trans t1 ON a.account_id = t1.account_id AND t1.date = '1993-03-22'
JOIN 
    trans t2 ON a.account_id = t2.account_id AND t2.date = '1998-12-27'
WHERE 
    l.date = '1993-07-05' AND l.status = 'A'
LIMIT 1;

WITH first_approved_loan AS (
    SELECT account_id
    FROM loan
    WHERE date = '1993-07-05' AND status = 'A'
    LIMIT 1
),
balance_start AS (
    SELECT balance AS start_balance
    FROM trans
    WHERE account_id = (SELECT account_id FROM first_approved_loan)
      AND date = '1993-03-22'
),
balance_end AS (
    SELECT balance AS end_balance
    FROM trans
    WHERE account_id = (SELECT account_id FROM first_approved_loan)
      AND date = '1998-12-27'
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN start_balance IS NULL OR end_balance IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE (end_balance - start_balance) * 1.0 / start_balance
    END AS increase_rate
FROM balance_start, balance_end;

SELECT 
  (t2.balance - t1.balance) * 1.0 / t1.balance AS increase_rate
FROM loan l
JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN trans t1 ON a.account_id = t1.account_id AND t1.date = '1993-03-22'
JOIN trans t2 ON a.account_id = t2.account_id AND t2.date = '1998-12-27'
WHERE l.date = '1993-07-05' AND l.status = 'A'
ORDER BY l.date
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    (t2.balance - t1.balance) * 1.0 / t1.balance AS increase_rate
FROM loan l
JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN trans t1 ON a.account_id = t1.account_id AND t1.date = '1993-03-22'
JOIN trans t2 ON a.account_id = t2.account_id AND t2.date = '1998-12-27'
WHERE l.date = '1993-07-05' AND l.status = 'A'
ORDER BY l.date
LIMIT 1;

FROM loan l
JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN trans t1 ON a.account_id = t1.account_id AND t1.date = '1993-03-22'
JOIN trans t2 ON a.account_id = t2.account_id AND t2.date = '1998-12-27'
WHERE l.date = '1993-07-05' AND l.status = 'A'

LIMIT 1;
